title: schoenus carsei
intro: Schoenus carsei, also known as the coastal club-rush or Schoenus sphaericus, is a species of sedge native to Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing relief from fever. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and rhizomes are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
